description: Generations have believed that any wish written on a note on its head will come true when it awakens.

abilities.name: Stardust Song
abilities.effect: Once during your turn, when you put Jirachi from your hand onto your Bench, you may flip 3 coins. For each heads, search your discard pile for a Psychic Energy card and attach it to Jirachi.

attacks.name: Time Hollow
attacks.effect: Choose a number of your opponent’s Stage 1 or Stage 2 Evolved Pokémon up to the amount of Energy attached to Jirachi. Remove the highest Stage Evolution card from each of those Pokémon and put those cards back into your opponent’s hand.

name: Jirachi

description: It blasts fireballs of over 3,600 degrees Fahrenheit out of its arms. Its breath also sears and sizzles.

attacks.name: Hard Crush
attacks.effect: Discard the top 3 cards from your deck. This attack does 50 damage times the number of Energy cards you discarded.

attacks.name: Mantle Bazooka
attacks.effect: Discard 2 Fire Energy attached to Magmortar.

name: Magmortar

description: It starts its life with a wondrous power that permits it to bond with any kind of Pokémon.

attacks.name: Deep Sea Swirl
attacks.effect: Shuffle your hand into your deck. Then, draw 5 cards.

name: Manaphy

abilities.name: Psychic Float
abilities.effect: If you have any Psychic Energy attached to your Active Pokémon, the Retreat Cost for that Pokémon is 0.

attacks.name: Double Leg Hammer
attacks.effect: Choose 2 of your opponent’s Benched Pokémon. This attack does 40 damage to each of them. (Don’t apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

description: Its cries sound like incantations to torment the foe. It appears where you least expect it.

abilities.name: Magical Trans
abilities.effect: Once during your turn (before your attack), you may move a Psychic Energy attached to 1 of your Pokémon to another of your Pokémon. This power can’t be used if Mismagius is affected by a Special Condition.

attacks.name: Psychic Pulse
attacks.effect: Does 10 damage to each of your opponent’s Benched Pokémon that has any damage counters on it. (Don’t apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

name: Mismagius

description: It traps foes with the suction cups on its tentacles, then smashes them with its rock-hard head.

attacks.name: Switch Cannon
attacks.effect: Choose 1 of your opponent’s Pokémon. This attack does 30 damage to that Pokémon. (Don’t apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.) Switch Octillery with 1 of your Benched Pokémon.

attacks.name: Ink Bomb
attacks.effect: If the Defending Pokémon tries to attack during your opponent’s next turn, your opponent flips a coin. If tails, that attack does nothing.

name: Octillery

description: Whenever three or more of these get together, they sing in a loud voice that sounds like bellowing.

abilities.name: Leap Frog
abilities.effect: Once during your turn (before your attack), you may choose a Water Pokémon on your Bench and switch it with your Active Pokémon. This power can’t be used if Politoed is affected by a Special Condition.

attacks.name: Big Chorus
attacks.effect: Flip a coin for each Water Pokémon you have in play. This attack does 30 damage times the number of heads.

name: Politoed

description: The blooming of Gracidea flowers confers the power of flight upon it. Feelings of gratitude are the message it delivers.

abilities.name: Celebration Wind
abilities.effect: Once during your turn, when you put Shaymin from your hand onto your Bench, you may move as many Energy cards attached to your Pokémon as you like to any of your other Pokémon.

attacks.name: Energy Bloom
attacks.effect: Remove 3 damage counters from each of your Pokémon that has any Energy attached to it.

name: Shaymin

description: It disguises itself as a tree to avoid attack. It hates water, so it will disappear if it starts raining.

attacks.name: Push Over
attacks.effect: Does 20 damage times the amount of Fighting Energy attached to Sudowoodo.

attacks.name: Rumble
attacks.effect: The Defending Pokémon can’t retreat during your opponent’s next turn.

name: Sudowoodo

description: Ancient people imagined that beneath the ground, a gigantic Torterra dwelled.

attacks.name: Giga Drain
attacks.effect: Remove from Torterra the number of damage counters equal to the damage you did to the Defending Pokémon.

name: Torterra

description: In South America, it is said that its right eye sees the future and its left eye views the past.

attacks.name: Psywave
attacks.effect: Does 20 damage times the amount of Energy attached to the Defending Pokémon.

attacks.name: Confuse Ray
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, the Defending Pokémon is now Confused.

name: Xatu

description: It can take down any opponent with its powerful poison stingers. It sometimes attacks in swarms.

attacks.name: Twineedle
attacks.effect: Flip 2 coins. This attack does 50 damage times the number of heads.

attacks.name: Paralyze Poison
attacks.effect: The Defending Pokémon is now Poisoned. Flip a coin. If heads, the Defending Pokémon is also Paralyzed.

name: Beedrill

description: It deliberately makes itself heavy so it can withstand the recoil of the water jets it fires.

abilities.name: Wash Out
abilities.effect: As often as you like during your turn (before your attack), you may move a Water Energy attached to 1 of your Benched Pokémon to your Active Pokémon. This power can’t be used if Blastoise is affected by a Special Condition.

attacks.name: Hydro Launcher
attacks.effect: Return 2 Water Energy attached to Blastoise to your hand. Choose 1 of your opponent’s Pokémon. This attack does 100 damage to that Pokémon. (Don’t apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

name: Blastoise

description: The development of wings on its legs enables it to fly fast but also makes it tough to stop and rest.

attacks.name: Supersonic
attacks.effect: The Defending Pokémon is now Confused.

attacks.name: Hurricane Wing
attacks.effect: Flip 4 coins. This attack does 30 damage times the number of heads.

name: Crobat

description: It shoots itself suddenly high into the sky, then plummets down in one fell swoop to strike its prey.

attacks.name: Repeating Drill
attacks.effect: Flip 5 coins. This attack does 20 damage times the number of heads.

name: Fearow

description: With its flotation sac inflated, it can carry people on its back. It deflates the sac before it dives.

abilities.name: Water Acceleration
abilities.effect: Once during your turn (before your attack), you may attach a Water Energy card from your hand to Floatzel. This power can’t be used if Floatzel is affected by a Special Condition.

name: Floatzel

description: It sleeps deep on the ocean floor to build its energy. It is said to cause tornadoes as it wakes.

attacks.name: Water Arrow
attacks.effect: Choose 1 of your opponent’s Pokémon. This attack does 30 damage to that Pokémon. (Don’t apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

attacks.name: Stream Pump
attacks.effect: You may do 50 damage plus 30 more damage. If you do, return an Energy card attached to Kingdra to your hand.

name: Kingdra

description: The light it emits is so bright that it can illuminate the sea’s surface from a depth of over three miles.

attacks.name: Confuse Ray
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, the Defending Pokémon is now Confused.

attacks.name: Reflect Energy
attacks.effect: Move an Energy card attached to Lanturn to 1 of your Benched Pokémon.

name: Lanturn

description: It’s said that no foe can remain invisible to Lucario, since it can detect auras, even foes it could not otherwise see.

attacks.name: Bulk Up
attacks.effect: During your next turn, each of Lucario’s attacks does 30 more damage to the Defending Pokémon (before applying Weakness and Resistance).

name: Lucario

description: Some legends claim that each of its nine tails has its own unique type of special mystical power.

attacks.name: Heat Acceleration
attacks.effect: Search your discard pile for up to 3 Fire Energy cards and attach them to 1 of your Pokémon.

attacks.name: Searing Flame
attacks.effect: The Defending Pokémon is now Burned.

name: Ninetales

description: Although an energetic, skilled swimmer that uses all of its muscles, it lives on dry land.

attacks.name: Steamroll
attacks.effect: Does 20 damage to 1 of your opponent’s Benched Pokémon. (Don’t apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

attacks.name: Dynamic Punch
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 60 damage plus 40 more damage and the Defending Pokémon is now Confused.

name: Poliwrath

description: If approached while asleep, it may awaken and angrily give chase in a groggy state of semi-sleep.

attacks.name: Bebop Punch
attacks.effect: Choose 1 of your opponent’s Pokémon. Flip a coin until you get tails. This attack does 50 damage times the number of heads to that Pokémon. (Don’t apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

name: Primeape

description: Its sweet aroma attracts prey. Then it spews poison. The more toxic it is, the sweeter its aroma.

abilities.name: Energy Signal
abilities.effect: When you attach a Grass Energy card or Psychic Energy card from your hand to Roserade during your turn, you may use this power. If you attach a Grass Energy card, the Defending Pokémon is now Confused. If you attach a Psychic Energy card, the Defending Pokémon is now Poisoned. This power can’t be used if Roserade is affected by a Special Condition.

attacks.name: Power Blow
attacks.effect: Does 20 damage times the amount of Energy attached to Roserade.

name: Roserade

description: Its body has been compressed deep under the ground. As a result, it is even harder than a diamond.

attacks.name: Guard Press
attacks.effect: During your opponent’s next turn, any damage done to Steelix by attacks is reduced by 20 (after applying Weakness and Resistance).

attacks.name: Steel Swing
attacks.effect: Flip 2 coins. This attack does 80 damage times the number of heads.

name: Steelix

description: You find abandoned coal mines full of them. They dig tirelessly in search of coal.

abilities.name: Hot Snort
abilities.effect: Once during your turn when you put Torkoal from your hand onto your Bench, you may flip a coin. If heads, the Defending Pokémon is now Burned.

name: Torkoal

description: Extremely strong, it can change the landscape. It has an insolent nature that makes it not care about others.

attacks.name: Tail Crush
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 40 damage plus 20 more damage.

attacks.name: Hyper Beam
attacks.effect: Discard an Energy card attached to the Defending Pokémon.

name: Tyranitar

description: With its ability to distinguish any aroma, it unfailing finds all food buried deep underground.

attacks.name: Cross Chop
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 50 damage plus 30 more damage.

name: Ursaring

description: During times of strong sunlight, its bud blooms, its petals open fully, and it becomes very active.

abilities.effect: Once during your turn (before your attack), you may remove 1 damage counter from your Active Pokémon. This power can’t be used if Cherrim is affected by a Special Condition.

name: Cherrim

name: Dunsparce

attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, the Defending Pokémon is now Asleep.

attacks.effect: Discard a Fire Energy card from your hand. Then, draw 3 cards.

attacks.name: Hypnoblast

name: Poliwhirl

description: Its shell is as hard as sheet rock, and it is also very strong. Its thrashing can topple a mountain.

attacks.name: Rage
attacks.effect: Does 20 damage plus 10 more damage for each damage counter on Pupitar.

name: Pupitar

description: Even sealed in its shell, it can move freely. Hard and fast, it has outstanding destructive power.
name: Pupitar

description: Its fin tips leak poison. Its fins and bones are highly valued as ingredients in herbal medicine.

attacks.effect: Does 10 damage to 1 of your opponent’s Benched Pokémon. (Don’t apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

attacks.effect: Flip 3 coins. This attack does 30 damage times the number of heads. Tauros is now Confused.

attacks.effect: You may switch Beldum with 1 of your Benched Pokémon.

attacks.effect: Does 10 damage to 1 of your opponent’s Benched Pokémon. (Don’t apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

attacks.effect: Search your deck for an Energy card, show it to your opponent, and put it into your hand. Shuffle your deck afterward.

name: Chinchou

attacks.effect: Flip 2 coins. This attack does 20 damage times the number of heads.

name: Natu

attacks.name: Boundless Power
attacks.effect: Onix can’t attack during your next turn.

name: Onix

attacks.effect: Flip 2 coins. This attack does 20 damage plus 20 more damage for each heads.

name: Onix

description: The direction of its belly spiral differs by area. The equator is thought to have an effect on this.

attacks.effect: Search your deck for a Basic Pokémon and put it onto your Bench. Shuffle your deck afterward.

name: Poliwag

description: It has superb accuracy. The water it shoots out can strike even moving prey from more than 300 feet.

attacks.effect: Choose 1 of your opponent’s Pokémon. This attack does 20 damage to that Pokémon. (Don’t apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

name: Remoraid

description: They communicate with one another using their auras. They are able to run all through the night.

name: Riolu

description: Roselia that drink nutritionally rich springwater are said to reveal rare coloration when they bloom.

attacks.effect: Flip 3 coins. This attack does 20 damage times the number of heads. Roselia is now Confused.

name: Roselia

description: It flaps its short wings to flush out insects from tall grass. It then plucks them with its stubby beak.

attacks.effect: Remove 4 damage counters from Spearow. Spearow can’t retreat during your next turn.

name: Spearow

description: The shell is soft when it is born. It soon becomes so resilient, prodding fingers will bounce off it.
name: Squirtle

description: The curved antlers subtly change the flow of air to create a strange space where reality is distorted.

attacks.name: Mystifying Horns
attacks.effect: The Defending Pokémon is now Confused.

attacks.effect: Teddiursa does 10 damage to itself.

name: Tropius

attacks.effect: If this attack does any damage to the Defending Pokémon (after applying Weakness and Resistance), remove 1 damage counter from Turtwig.

name: Turtwig

description: Its poison stinger is very powerful. Its bright-colored body is intended to warn off its enemies.

name: Weedle
